title: eranthemum microphyllum
intro: Eranthemum microphyllum, also known as the dwarf eranthemum or dwarf lantana, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eranthemum microphyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
